package rulecoverage

func NegativeSharedGormDbStateMutatedAndReusedAcrossRequests() string {
    ruleID := "shared_gorm_db_state_mutated_and_reused_across_requests"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Code that mutates shared `*gorm.DB` state and reuses it as if it were immutable configuration."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
